data.title: White House economic adviser Hassett declines to say when Fed chair nominee will be announced
data.description: White House economic adviser Hassett refused to say when the nomination for Federal Reserve Chairman will be announced. (Jinshi)

data.title: The DeAgentAI Genesis airdrop has been launched, and the main staking event will start on September 22nd.
data.description: According to official news, DeAgentAI, the leading AI project in the Sui ecosystem, announced that its Genesis Airdrop has officially started distribution today and is expected to be completed within 48 hours. Its main staking system will be officially launched at 15:00 UTC time on September 22 (23:00 Beijing time). The system has three modules designed for different users: including "current multi-reward pool", "regular golden shovel pool", and "community exclusive arena" based on Discord identity.

data.title: Bybit Web3 24-hour market: Two tokens surge over 40%, with LLM leading the gains at 47%.
data.description: According to Bybit Web 3's current "hot coin capture" data, Web 3 market performance has been outstanding in the past 24 hours, among which two popular coins have recorded significant gains: - LLM rose 47% - BITTY rose 42%

data.title: BitMart Card is officially launched, and the application channel for the physical card is open.
data.description: BitMart has launched a crypto credit card supporting 12 major cryptocurrencies, including USDT, BTC, and ETH. Applications for virtual, physical, and metal cards are now open. The card can be linked to e-wallets like Google Pay and used online and offline at over 50 million Visa merchants worldwide. The physical card can be used for cash withdrawals at Visa ATMs worldwide, with no limits on spending or annual withdrawals. First applicants will receive a waived application fee, bonus points on purchases, up to 100% cashback, double ATM withdrawal limits, a prize pool for popular tokens, Launchpad whitelist status, and tickets to Token 2049.

data.title: Japanese Firm Remixpoint Increases Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Japanese publicly traded company Remixpoint has increased its Bitcoin holdings by acquiring an additional 77.15 BTC. This acquisition brings the company's total Bitcoin holdings to 1,350 BTC.

data.title: DeFi Technologies subsidiary launches physically-backed BTC-collateralized ETP
data.description: Valour Digital Securities Limited, a subsidiary of Nasdaq-listed DeFi Technologies, announced the launch of a physically backed Bitcoin (BTC) exchange-traded product (ETF) on the London Stock Exchange. The product, 1 Valour Bitcoin Physical Staking, provides investors with unique exposure to Bitcoin staking returns. The product is reportedly backed 1:1 by physical Bitcoin. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Caliber has spent $6.5 million to buy LINK tokens
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Caliber announced that it has spent $6.5 million to purchase LINK tokens as part of its Digital Asset Treasury (DAT) strategy. A total of 278,011 LINK tokens were purchased at an average price of $23.38, bringing the company's total LINK token holdings to $6.7 million. (Globenewswire)

data.title: White House economic adviser Hassett: Economic growth without inflation is beginning to emerge
data.description: White House economic adviser Hassett said that inflation in the past three months has been more severe than previously seen, and it appears that economic growth without inflation has begun to emerge. (Jinshi)

data.title: Stablecoin protocol STBL plans to mint 100 million USST stablecoins using Franklin Templeton’s BENJI token
data.description: Avtar Sehra, CEO of the stablecoin protocol STBL, announced that the protocol's next steps include minting 100 million USST stablecoins using Franklin Templeton's BENJI token and announcing partnerships with several companies, including a US payments company. The protocol is expected to be open to the public in the fourth quarter. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Greenidge Generation sells its Bitcoin mining farm for $3.6 million
data.description: Greenidge Generation, a Nasdaq-listed company, announced the completion of the sale of its Bitcoin mining farm in Columbus, Mississippi, to US Digital Mining Mississippi LLC for $3.6 million. (Businesswire)

data.title: Thumzup Media Corporation Acquires 7.5 Million DOGE for Strategic Reserve
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Thumzup Media Corporation, a Nasdaq-listed company with investments from Donald Trump Jr., has announced the acquisition of 7.5 million DOGE, valued at approximately $2 million. This move is part of the company's strategy to include Dogecoin in its reserve holdings.

data.title: NBA star Kevin Durant once bought Bitcoin from Coinbase, but the money remains in his account because he forgot his password and has not been sold.
data.description: NBA star Kevin Durant's agent, Rich Kleiman, attended an event with Durant and revealed that he had helped the player purchase Bitcoin in 2015, but because he forgot the password, the Bitcoin remains in Durant's account. Rich Kleiman explained, "After joining the Warriors, Durant attended the birthday party of the founder of a16z. He was encouraged to buy Bitcoin and later created a Coinbase account. He's now forgotten his password. Fortunately, he hasn't sold the Bitcoin yet, and its price is still soaring." (EssentiallySports)

data.title: Hyperscale Data Expands Bitcoin Investment to $8 Million
data.description: Hyperscale Data, a NYSE American-listed company, announced it will increase its Bitcoin investment to $8 million, adding to its current holdings of $2 million worth of Bitcoin acquired through mining. It will also increase its wholly-owned subsidiary, Sentinum, from $5 million to $6 million in open market Bitcoin purchases to further strengthen its balance sheet. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Planet Evening News | September 18
data.description: 1. BNB briefly broke through 1,000 USDT, setting a new all-time high. 2. CoinGecko: 86.7% of respondents believe Bitcoin will reach a new high in 2025, possibly exceeding $150,000. 3. Approximately 25% of listed BTC treasuries have a market capitalization lower than the value of their BTC holdings. 4. A major whale may have sold 5,000 ETH, generating a cumulative profit of $5.08 million. 5. Those with at least 200 Binance Alpha points are eligible for a DeAgentAI (AIA) airdrop. 6. Polymarket predicts a 99% probability of Ripple ETF approval in 2025, with over $177,000 in bets. 7. Coindesk reporters sharply comment on the KRW1 Korean won stablecoin: A stablecoin used solely for domestic transactions is meaningless. 8. CryptoQuant: BTC is experiencing short-term overheating and could reach a new all-time high if the upward trend is confirmed in the next two weeks. 9. A whale once again spent $3.09 million to purchase more than 54,000 HYPEs, and the total holding value increased to $5.7 million; 10. CZ: Pay attention to the threat of North Korean hackers. Crypto projects should carefully screen candidates and train employees not to download files.

data.title: Bitget has launched BARD/USDT perpetual contracts with up to 50x leverage
data.description: According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched the U-based BARD perpetual contract with a leverage range of 1-50 times, and the contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: USDC Treasury Burns Significant Amount on Ethereum
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, Whale Alert reported that at 20:00 UTC+8, the USDC Treasury destroyed 69,980,000 USDC on the Ethereum blockchain. This transaction is valued at approximately $69,959,006.

data.title: LM Funding America Acquires Bitcoin Mining Facility in Mississippi
data.description: According to Foresight News, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company LM Funding America has announced the acquisition of a Bitcoin mining facility located in Columbus, Mississippi. The purchase, valued at $4 million, was made from Greenidge Generation Holdings. This acquisition also includes approximately 2,300 Bitmain S19 series mining machines.

data.title: The on-chain supply of Gate GUSD exceeds 140 million, and three major mining pools are opened simultaneously, with an annualized return of up to 18.91%.
data.description: The official website indicates that the on-chain supply of Gate GUSD exceeds 140 million. Users holding GUSD in products such as spot trading, wealth management accounts, and Launchpool will enjoy a 4.4% annualized return on minting, which can be combined with the returns from this product, resulting in a double interest return. Currently, three GUSD mining pools within Gate Launchpool are operating simultaneously: the PORTALS pool currently offers an annualized yield of 18.51%, the AVNT pool offers an annualized yield of 18.91%, and the BOT pool offers an annualized yield of 17.35%. GUSD is a high-quality, yield-generating asset backed by Gate ecosystem revenue, Treasury bond RWAs, and stablecoins. The product supports trading and staking, and users receive daily annualized returns, aiming to provide relatively stable returns.

data.title: Bitcoin Taps $117,000, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Shine On Federal Reserve Rate Cut
data.description:
Cryptocurrency markets rallied on Thursday morning after the Federal Reserve delivered its anticipated 25-basis point rate cut, lifting risk sentiment across digital assets
source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/cryptocurrency/25/09/47735164/bitcoin-taps-117000-ethereum-xrp-dogecoin-shine-on-federal-reserve-rate-cut?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: MemeCore jumps 22% in 24 hours: Can the rally last?
data.description:
Large transactions, price breakouts, and liquidity fuel MemeCore's rise.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/memecore-jumps-22-in-24-hours-can-the-rally-last/
